[SYNTHETIC] FACT: Support Lead reports that agents cannot tell which adjustment policy applies to each request.
[SYNTHETIC] ASSUMPTION: The review stays draft/advisory and no support ticket is updated automatically.
[SYNTHETIC] INFERRED: Ticket triage may need a policy-decision matrix before workflow automation is considered.
[SYNTHETIC] QUESTION: Which billing-adjustment scenarios require supervisor review?
[SYNTHETIC] QUESTION: Which support-ticket fields prove policy eligibility?
[SYNTHETIC] RISK: Repeated manual lookup creates response-delay risk for support agents.
[SYNTHETIC] DEPENDENCY: Support policy ownership must be confirmed before drafting workflow rules.
